use_cases: A button with ripple animation effect triggered on hover for interactive feedback.
Interactive button that tracks mouse position and creates expanding circular ripple animations.
Reusable button component with smooth color transitions from dark text to white on hover.
A standalone button component with customizable className for flexible styling integration.
Button with dashed border styling for subtle visual distinction in UI layouts.
ai_summary: A ripple button component that creates an expanding circular animation effect following the mouse cursor on hover. Features smooth color transitions and a minimalist design with dashed border styling. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and uses React hooks for state management and mouse tracking.
